form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At the latest run ran on strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 8 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, on a slow track; head behind Ascot Green with 57.5kg at $8.50. The run before that did the work up front then tired 6th of 8 at Goulburn Mdn-Sw on March 10 over 1100m, slow going 7 len behind Master Yoda with 56.5kg at $5. Working up to a win. Tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. The run before that did the work up front then tired 6th of 8 at Goulburn Mdn-Sw on March 10 over 1100m, slow going 7 len behind Master Yoda with 56.5kg at $5. Working up to a win. Tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began only fairly and then from a wide barrier shifted behind runners.
Near the 50m put in an awkward stride.

form.formComment: First starter. Three-year-old gelding by Foxwedge out of Cedar Grande. At the most recent trial finished eighth on December 23 at Taree over 1000m. Prefer to see how he handles race day.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter. Three-year-old gelding by Foxwedge out of Cedar Grande. At the most recent trial finished eighth on December 23 at Taree over 1000m. Prefer to see how he handles race day.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after eight months rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 11 at Albury Super Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1175m, on a slow track; 0.7 len behind Borjnord with 56.5kg at $9.50. Previously second-up 2nd of 14 at Coffs Harbour Super Mdn on August 1 over 1000m, slow going 0.7 len behind Mrs Goldberg carrying 55.5kg at $2.70. Will prove very tough to deny this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Second run back. form.formComment: First starter. Three-year-old gelding by Holler out of Corsica's Excuse. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 850m at Beaumont (Newcastle) February 12. Fitter for recent trials so it will pay to keep him safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter. Three-year-old gelding by Holler out of Corsica's Excuse. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 850m at Beaumont (Newcastle) February 12. Fitter for recent trials so it will pay to keep him safe.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation eighth of 11 at Port Macquarie Ctry Mdn-Sw October 10 over 1000m, 7 len behind Angels Cloud with 54.5kg at $6. On debut second of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw September 23 over 1007m, soft track; 3 len behind Argyros with 54.5kg at $21. Is a likely improver who may be able to fill a minor spot after some key scratchings.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Resumes from a spell. Is a likely improver who may be able to fill a minor spot after some key scratchings.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Travelled very wide and without cover for the majority of the event.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation ran last of 8 at Scone Ing Chall May 16 over 1100m, soft track; 11 len behind Cashbook with 56.5kg at $151. On debut ninth of 12 at Tamworth Rom Dream April 24 over 1000m, 7 len behind Sukeban with 55kg at $41. Doesn't bring the right form to the table.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second-up. First start 5th of 8 at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw on October 11 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Chess Master with 55kg at $5.50. Went for a spell before returning 2nd of 9 at Scone Super Mdn on March 20 over 1000m, slow going 0.8 len behind Lord Remlap carrying 56.5kg at $31. Sure to feature.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 300m, corrected after laying in towards the heels of Chess Master.

form.formComment: First starter by Calyx out of Sticky Beak. Has a total of two trials leading in today's debut. Shapes as one of the top three chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Calyx out of Sticky Beak. Has a total of two trials leading in today's debut. Shapes as one of the top three chances.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Kelly Barber trained three-year-old filly lining up for debut. Looked good in a recent trial win. Good draw will assist chances. Worth including.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Kelly Barber trained three-year-old filly lining up for debut. Looked good in a recent trial win. Good draw will assist chances. Worth including.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months ran last of 8 at Newcastle Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 900m, slow going 7 len behind Twoexcel with 59kg at $81. Previously second-up 9th of 11 at Grafton Mdn-Sw on October 28 over 1015m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Monaco Flyer with 59kg at $14. Unlikely to threaten.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Raced wide, with cover, in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months ran last of 8 at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, on a slow track; 12 len behind Farnciful with 55kg at $101. Previously second-up got back early 7th of 10 at Coffs Harbour Super Mdn on September 14 over 1012m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Magnolia Jewel with 55kg at $101. Still early in the prep and might need more time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Travelled four-wide and without cover throughout the event.
Hung out rounding the turn near the 700m and again near the 600m.
Laid in under pressure during the straight.
Raced wide, without cover, in the early and middle stages.
Travelled keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: On debut. Two-year-old filly by Profiteer out of After The Dream. At the most recent trial finished fourth on March 1 at Coffs Harbour over 808m. Makes debut on home track, keeping safe for a minor spot at longer odds.
